brand_description: A clean beauty brand focused on sensitive skin-friendly makeup and skincare. Products are dermatologist-tested, hypoallergenic, and free from common irritants.

products.name: SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray
products.size: 120 mL / 4 fl oz (Standard); also available in 30mL, 150mL, 473mL

key_actives.name: Hypochlorous Acid
key_actives.purpose: Anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, soothes irritation, reduces redness

products.notes: National Eczema Association Seal of Acceptance™. Can be used AM/PM. Use before skincare actives like vitamin C. Not a makeup setting spray.

products.name: ShineFlasher Brightening Powder
inci_ingredients: Not available - product may be discontinued or limited edition
products.notes: This product could not be verified on the Tower 28 Beauty website. It may be discontinued, limited edition, or sold through exclusive retailers.

products.name: SuperDew Shimmer-Free Highlighter
inci_ingredients: Not available - product may be discontinued or limited edition
products.notes: This product could not be verified on the Tower 28 Beauty website. It may be discontinued, limited edition, or sold through exclusive retailers.

products.name: Soothe & Glow Lip Oil
inci_ingredients: Not available - product may be discontinued or limited edition
products.notes: This product could not be verified on the Tower 28 Beauty website. Similar products include LipSoftie Lip Treatment. May be discontinued or limited edition.

products.name: ClearInsight Peel Pads
inci_ingredients: Not available - product may be discontinued or limited edition
products.notes: This product could not be verified on the Tower 28 Beauty website. It may be discontinued, limited edition, or sold through exclusive retailers.

products.name: BeachPlease Lip + Cheek Stick
inci_ingredients: Not fully available on public-facing pages
products.notes: Luminous tinted balm for lips and cheeks. Available in multiple shades. Clean, hypoallergenic formula.

products.name: MakeWaves Mascara
inci_ingredients: Not fully available on public-facing pages
products.notes: Lengthening and curling mascara. Ophthalmologist-tested. Safe for sensitive eyes and contact lens wearers.

data_sources: INCIDecoder database (for SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray)
limitations: Several products (ShineFlasher Brightening Powder, SuperDew Shimmer-Free Highlighter, Soothe & Glow Lip Oil, ClearInsight Peel Pads) could not be verified on the Tower 28 Beauty website and may be discontinued or limited edition
Full INCI ingredient lists were not available on public-facing product pages for most products
Sephora and other retailer sites blocked access during research
Tower 28 Beauty does not consistently publish full INCI lists on their product pages
